subcodes.first_line: All the world hath been created for the recognition of this blessed Day, and hath been called into being from nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم از برای عرفان این یوم مبارک خلق شده اند و از عدم بوجود آمده اینست
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
